$schema: Every session MUST update this file as its LAST action. Never edit fields of units you did not work on.

legend.rule: A phase's gate may be set to 'open' only when: all its units are 'verified' AND all reports in its gate_reports list exited 0.

last_session.unit: U-C.2 defect fix + DB-scenario authoring (U-C.2/3/4/5) + fleet_parity_sweep.php + U-C.4 self-review + U-A.1 (redesigned flag-gated) + U-A.2 + U-A.3 -- out-of-order per the same standing owner authorization
last_session.note: OWNER AUTHORIZATION ON RECORD (extended to P7 this session): P2/P3/P4/P5/P6/P7 gates all stay closed on their own human/time-based preconditions regardless of code completeness. ENGINE_MODE/STATE_MACHINE_ENABLED/COMMAND_LAYER_ENABLED stayed off/unset in production throughout. FIXED the independent verify record's Finding 1: handleAddComponent's shadow branch previously never ran the legacy add (undefined $result, would have broken every add under COMMAND_LAYER_ENABLED=shadow) -- now mirrors handleRemoveComponent's pattern, comparing the command verdict against the legacy call's REAL outcome. Wrote real (not placeholder) DB-backed scenario code into all four tests/regression/*_command_test.php files, gated by a live scratch-DB connection check -- self-skip with an honest SKIPPED message this session (local MySQL still unreachable: 'Access denied for root@localhost, using password: NO' -- confirmed NOT a stopped-service issue this time, root truly has no known working credential in this environment; owner chose to have this session write seeders + code rather than chase DB access further). Added scripts/verify/fleet_parity_sweep.php (offline fleet-wide engine-vs-legacy replay reusing characterize_compatibility.php's own extraction loop + ServerBuilder's existing ENGINE_MODE=shadow hook/ShadowRunner -- not executed this session, confirmed to fail closed with a clear message when the DB is unreachable rather than a false green). Self-reviewed U-C.4 (ReplaceComponentCommand) against its pack -- no defects found, TargetStateBuilder::withAdd's append-only contract confirmed correct for the end()-based new-row-id lookup; still 'implemented' per this session's own instruction (never mark verified). Did NOT attempt Finding 2 (draft/building->finalized edge-table gap) -- documented where it bites in finalize_command_test.php's new DB scenario and in the P6 handoff instead, per explicit instruction. P7 (08-api-adapters): U-A.1 REDESIGNED as flag-gated per owner decision (deviation documented in migration/08-api-adapters/DEPRECATION.md) -- the advisory pre-check block in handleAddComponent is now skipped only at CommandLayer::mode()==='enforce' (mirrors U-C.5's precedent), NOT deleted unconditionally as the pack's literal text specified; the handler-level SFP auto-assign SQL was NOT deleted (AddComponentCommand has no equivalent yet -- a real feature-parity gap, flagged, not silently cut). U-A.2 shipped: server-replace-component/server-transition-status new additive actions (both gated behind CommandLayer::mode() !== 'off', a deliberate addition to the pack since neither command has ever run against production data), expected_revision->409-with-current-revision on all four mutation handlers, quantity<1 rejected with 400, quantity>1 mapped to N sequential command dispatches in one outer transaction (enforce mode only). U-A.3 shipped: VerdictShim.php (Verdict->legacy envelope, const rule_id->error_type map, RAM enrichment from memory.downclock, unknown rule ids fall back to compatibility_failure never a 500) wired into all four mutation handlers' CommandFailed catch blocks. New seeder database/seeders/2026_07_12_001_add-server-replace-transition-permissions.sql (server.replace/server.transition ACL rows, mirrors server.edit/server.create grants) -- shown to the owner, NOT run. Full DB-free regression sweep re-run at the end of this session (all green, see handoff for the full list) -- config_component_repository_test.php (a PRE-EXISTING test, not touched this session) remains the one file that still fatally requires a live DB connection rather than self-skipping; not a regression introduced here. All units this session: implemented, NOT independently verified (per this repo's own convention) -- a DB-capable session is needed to actually execute every scenario written this session and this migration's several prior sessions.
